calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-28-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES-RICHARD CARRINGTON SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR MICHAEL SHERWOOD ROSSOFF ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF C & O REALTY CORP. A CALIF. CORP. ALSO PRESENT DANNY ANDERSON (RESIDENT MANAGER) AND ROBIN SCHIDLOWSKI (PROPERTY MANGER). DEFTS IN PRO PER WALTER E. BARANCO AND JOANNE BARANCO PRESENT.

CASE SETTLED PER STIPULATION. BOTH DEFTS. TO VACATE THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 990 GEARY STREET, #508, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. BY 6/8/04 AT 5PM AND RETURN KEYS TO THE MANAGER. IF PREMISES VACATED THE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES WAIVED. PLAINTIFF RETAINS SECURITY DEPOSIT. NO STAYS OF EXECUTION. IF DEFTS DO NOT VACATE THE PREMISES BY 6/8/04, PLAINTIFF ON 24HR-NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS WILL OBTAIN JUDGMENT FOR RESITITUTION OF THE PREMISES AND RENT OF $2476.64. IF DEFTS. COMPLY WITH THE TERMS, PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2004 Advanced From May-17-04 To May-06-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-06-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joanne Baranco, Defendant Propria Persona and Moving Party
Michael Rossoff, Esq. (415) 863-7100 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party C & O Realty Corporation
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT WALTER BARANCO, JOANNE BARANCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- overruled with five (5) days to answer. Order signed. (301/JLW/ac) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
